summary: Iteration 23: Big Market feature testing complete. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified working correctly including tabs, tables, factor grid, market pulse, and stock snapshot.
passed_tests: GET /api/big-market/overview returns 200
GET /api/big-market/overview returns 13+ Indian indices with proper structure
GET /api/big-market/overview returns 15+ global indices
GET /api/big-market/overview returns 7 commodities
GET /api/big-market/overview returns 7 currencies
GET /api/big-market/overview returns 4 yields
GET /api/big-market/overview returns factor_grid with Value/Core/Growth headers
GET /api/big-market/overview returns perf_rankings
GET /api/big-market/snapshot/RELIANCE.NS returns 200 with all required fields
GET /api/big-market/snapshot/HDFCBANK.NS returns 200
GET /api/big-market/snapshot/INVALID returns 404
Frontend: /big-market page shows 'Big Market' header with data-testid='big-market-page'
Frontend: Indian Indices table shows 13 rows with Price, Chg, % columns
Frontend: All tabs visible (India, Global, Commodities, Currencies, Yields, Analysis)
Frontend: Global Indices table shows 15 rows
Frontend: Commodities table shows 7 rows
Frontend: Currencies table shows 7 rows
Frontend: Yields table shows 4 rows
Frontend: Factor Grid visible with VALUE/CORE/GROWTH headers
Frontend: Market Pulse card shows Nifty 50 and India VIX
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Big Market' menu item
Frontend: Search ticker input with data-testid='big-market-search'
Frontend: Stock snapshot (RELIANCE.NS) shows name, price, chart, valuation, capital structure, performance returns
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified the Big Market feature: (1) /api/big-market/overview returns comprehensive market data including indian_indices (13), global_indices (15), commodities (7), currencies (7), yields (4), factor_grid, perf_rankings. First call may take 15-30s as it fetches ~45 tickers from yfinance in parallel, subsequent calls cached for 5 min. (2) /api/big-market/snapshot/{symbol} returns Koyfin-style stock snapshot with valuation, capital structure, chart data, performance returns. (3) Frontend Big Market page has all tabs working, factor grid shows Value/Core/Growth matrix, market pulse shows Nifty 50 and India VIX, stock search navigates to snapshot view.
